channel.title: AudioSpectroDemo Updates
channel.item: <<<<<<< HEAD Version 0.2.24 <enclosure url="https://github.com/Lixin-TU/AudioSpectroDemo/releases/download/v0.2.24/AudioSpectroDemo-v0.2.24.exe" sparkle:version="0.2.24" sparkle:shortVersionString="0.2.24" ======= Version 0.2.25 >>>>>> 9f31319 (spectrogram fix-v0.2.25a) type="application/octet-stream"/>
